title: Proud Lion Mandala Coloring Page
seoTitle: Medium Proud Lion Mandala Coloring Page - Free PDF | ColoringPalace
seoDescription: Download and print this medium proud lion mandala coloring sheet. Ideal for kids and teens with balanced outlines, natural textures, and a beautiful scenic background. Free printable PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: A Lion's roar can be heard from up to 5 miles away, helping them communicate and defend territory.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing smooth gradient shading using dual-brush markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about marine habitats and ocean conservation while developing fine motor coordination.
